sections.paragraph:
verb לדבוק

to stick, cling; cleave to; join; overtake

verb להידבק

to stick; cling

verb להידבק

be infected

verb לדבק

to glue, stick; tie, connect

verb להדביק

to stick, glue; infect; overtake, catch up

verb הודבק

be stuck, glued; infected

masculine noun

glue, gum, nexus, paste; joint; sticking together

adjective

attached, devoted, adherent, clinging, loyal
